Built by a Nurse. For the World.

The Operating System
for Global Nursing Care

NurseOS is an AI-powered, cloud-native, modular platform designed to digitize, connect, and elevate nursing practice globally — starting from Nigeria. Five integrated modules. One unified ecosystem.

HIPAA Aligned• Offline-First• Multilingual• AI-Powered

Integrated Modules

Patients Served (RUHC HMS)

Nurse-Led Founder
24/7
Designed for Round-the-Clock Care

Nurse-First Design
NG
Starting Market
Five Integrated Modules

One Platform. Complete Care.

Each module works independently but integrates seamlessly through a unified platform — creating an ecosystem that transforms nursing practice at every level.

NurseAI

Intelligent Clinical Assistant

AI-powered smart charting, clinical decision support, early warning scoring, and drug interaction checking. Transform how nurses document care with voice-to-note technology and real-time clinical intelligence.

Voice-to-Note Smart Charting
NEWS2 Early Warning System
Drug Interaction Checker
AI Care Plan Suggestions
Discharge Summary Generator

CareGrid

Global Nursing Network

Connect nurses and facilities across borders with seamless referral management, nurse-to-nurse consultations, and a shared knowledge bank. Build the network that African healthcare deserves.

Facility Directory & Search
Referral Management Pipeline
Video & Chat Consultations
Evidence-Based Knowledge Bank
Nurse Directory & Profiles

NurseAnalytics

Healthcare Intelligence

Turn data into decisions with real-time dashboards, disease surveillance, predictive staffing, and AI-generated insights. See the full picture of healthcare delivery across facilities and regions.

Real-Time Facility Dashboards
Disease Surveillance & Alerts
Predictive Staffing AI
Clinical Outcomes Tracking
Custom Report Builder

NurseID

Professional Identity

Build and showcase your nursing career with verified credentials, competency mapping, portfolio building, and continuous professional development tracking. Your career, verified and portable.

Verified Credential System
Competency Mapping & Radar
Professional Portfolio
CPD Points Tracker
Blockchain Verification

NurseAcademy

Learning & Simulation

Learn, practice, and certify with AI-powered courses, clinical simulations, and competency-based certifications. From student to specialist — your learning journey, powered by intelligence.

Interactive Course Platform
Clinical Scenario Simulations
AI-Powered Feedback
CPD-Certified Programs
Competency Certifications
Simple Pricing

Start Free. Scale When Ready.

From individual nurses to national health systems — NurseOS grows with you. All prices in Nigerian Naira.

Free

Individual Nurses

₦0forever

Get started with essential nursing tools

  • NurseID Professional Profile
  • Knowledge Bank Access
  • 3 Simulations per Month
  • Basic Smart Charting
  • Community Support
Most Popular

Facility Starter

Small Facilities (1-25 beds)

₦50,000/month

Full clinical tools for your facility

  • Full NurseAI Module
  • CareGrid Referrals
  • Basic Analytics Dashboard
  • 10 Nurse Seats
  • Email Support
  • Offline Mode

Facility Pro

Medium Facilities (25-100 beds)

₦150,000/month

Advanced intelligence for growing facilities

  • All Starter Features
  • Advanced Analytics & AI Insights
  • Disease Surveillance
  • Predictive Staffing
  • 50 Nurse Seats
  • Priority Support
  • Custom Reports

Need Enterprise or National deployment? Contact our team for custom pricing.
